untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculating morning session high-low range and its percentile levels (lower 25% and upper 75%), which requires intra-session range calculations not available in the allowed indicators list. The logic also requires session-aware time conditions (afternoon vs morning) and position-dependent entry/exit logic that cannot be fully expressed with static indicators. Indicators needed: morning_range_high, morning_range_low, morning_range_lower_25pct, morning_range_upper_75pct, and session_time context.
translation_notes: This signal is a classic intraday range-breakout pattern that requires: (1) tracking morning session OHLC separately, (2) calculating percentile levels within that range, (3) session-aware entry timing. The backtest engine would need custom preprocessing to compute morning range statistics before afternoon conditions can be evaluated. Consider implementing as a custom rule in the backtest engine rather than using generic indicators.
